inputs.label: Number of Stops
inputs.businessContext: Total delivery or service stops on the route.

inputs.label: Total Route Distance
inputs.businessContext: Total distance traveled for the route in kilometers.

inputs.label: Average Speed
inputs.businessContext: Average vehicle speed including traffic and stops.

inputs.label: Dwell Time per Stop
inputs.businessContext: Average time spent at each stop for loading/unloading.

inputs.label: Driver Hourly Rate
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage cost for the driver.

inputs.label: Vehicle Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of vehicle used for the route.

inputs.label: Traffic Condition
inputs.businessContext: Expected traffic condition along the route.

inputs.label: Use Optimization Algorithm
inputs.businessContext: Toggle to apply route optimization logic.

rules.message: Number of stops and total distance must be positive.
Average speed must be between 5 and 120 km/h.
Dwell time per stop must be between 0 and 120 minutes.
Refrigerated vehicles in heavy traffic may require additional fuel surcharge.

thresholds.alert: Fuel cost exceeds 500 currency units. Consider route consolidation.
Total travel time exceeds 8 hours. Driver may require rest break.
Stops per hour below 1.5. Route density is low; consider merging stops.

formulas.label: Total Travel Time
formulas.description: Total time from start to finish including stops.

formulas.label: Fuel Cost Total
formulas.description: Total fuel cost for the route.

formulas.label: Stops per Hour
formulas.description: Route efficiency metric: stops per hour of travel.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Excess Dwell Time
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Dwell time above industry benchmark of 8 minutes per stop.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Inefficient Route Factor
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Ratio of actual distance to optimal distance (if optimization not used).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Fuel Waste
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Extra fuel cost due to traffic and suboptimal routing.

suggestedActions.label: Consolidate Stops
suggestedActions.description: Merge stops within 2 km radius to reduce dwell time and distance.
suggestedActions.impact: Reduce total cost by up to 12%

suggestedActions.label: Schedule Off-Peak
suggestedActions.description: Shift route to off-peak hours to improve average speed.
suggestedActions.impact: Reduce travel time by up to 20%

suggestedActions.label: Consider Fuel-Efficient Vehicle
suggestedActions.description: Use a vehicle with lower fuel consumption per km.
suggestedActions.impact: Reduce fuel cost by up to 15%
